name: creating-kubernetes-deployments
description: Deploy applications to Kubernetes with production-ready manifests. Supports Deployments, Services, Ingress, HPA, ConfigMaps, Secrets, StatefulSets, and NetworkPolicies. Includes health checks, resource limits, auto-scaling, and TLS termination. Use when working with creating kubernetes deployments. Trigger with 'creating', 'kubernetes', 'deployments'.
